top_signals.title: Taiwan drone exports soar on Ukraine war
top_signals.summary: Low-cost drones used for reconnaissance and strikes are in high demand as global governments boost defense spending amid intensifying conflicts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Earnings Revival Under Threat as Commodity Prices Surge
top_signals.summary: Even if the Middle East war ends soon, corporate profits would stay under pressure, BofA says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Imai combines with relievers for MLB’s first no-hitter since 2024
top_signals.summary: Tatsuya Imai (2-2) walked four batters and struck out two over a career-high six innings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
